name: Dragon Bones
description: The bleached skeleton of a great wyrm sprawls across a clearing, its ribcage arching high enough to walk beneath. Wildflowers grow through the eye sockets.
dialogueOnInteract: You press your hand against the massive skull and feel a vibration deep in the bone. Visions flicker — fire across the sky, a knight with a shining lance, the beast's final roar echoing through these hills. An inscription on a fang reads: 'Here fell Cyndrath, last of the old fire.'
